# Cognee Space

Cognee Space is an independent, unofficial deployment planner for teams evaluating Cognee AI memory, knowledge graph RAG, MCP memory servers, and self-hosted agent context.

Canonical site: https://cognee.space/
Pricing path: https://cognee.space/pricing/
Planner access: paid access required after Polar checkout verification.
Facts JSON: https://cognee.space/.well-known/cognee-space.json

Core pages:
- https://cognee.space/ai-memory/ explains persistent AI memory planning.
- https://cognee.space/knowledge-graph-rag/ explains knowledge graph RAG rollout planning.
- https://cognee.space/agent-memory/ explains agent workflow memory boundaries.
- https://cognee.space/mcp-memory-server/ explains MCP memory server planning.
- https://cognee.space/self-host-cognee/ explains self-hosted deployment checks.

Relationship:
This site is independent and unofficial. Official upstream references are kept as final source notes in the public documentation repository and source notes page, not as conversion paths.

Official Sources:
- https://github.com/topoteretes/cognee
- https://docs.cognee.ai/
- https://www.cognee.ai
